title: The Miracle Man
writer: George M. Cohan, Robert Hobart Davis, Samuel Hoffenstein
actors: Sylvia Sidney, Chester Morris, Robert Coogan
plot: A gang of crooks evade the police by moving their operations to a small town. There the gang's leader, John Madison, encounters a faith healer and uses him to scam the gullible public of funds for a supposed chapel. But when a rea...
